patch:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/youtube-wiki/skills/youtube-deep-research/node.yaml
+schema: node-definition/v1
+id: youtube-deep-research-dxky
+title: Youtube Deep Research
+description: 转换成不绑定上下游的 Runtime Node；首节点测试允许直接输入 source_url，保留超时、轮询间隔和是否包含 transcript
+  等配置。
+version: 0.1-runtime-draft
+skill:
+  id: youtube-deep-research
+  source: skill-installer
+  install_command: bash <(curl -fsSL 'https://skill.vyibc.com/install-youtube-deep-research.sh?ts=20260630125451')
+  source_digest:
+    installer_url: https://skill.vyibc.com/install-youtube-deep-research.sh?ts=20260630125451
+    zip_url: https://skill.vyibc.com/youtube-deep-research/release/youtube-deep-research-20260630125451.zip?ts=20260630125451
+    files:
+    - path: youtube-deep-research/SKILL.md
+      bytes: 2904
+      truncated: false
+    - path: youtube-deep-research/agents/openai.yaml
+      bytes: 254
+      truncated: false
+    - path: youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh
+      bytes: 2451
+      truncated: false
+    - path: youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube_deep_research.py
+      bytes: 10820
+      truncated: false
+executor:
+  type: agent-skill
+  agent: hermes
+  skill: youtube-deep-research
+  request_template: node-execution-request/v1
+entry:
+  inputs:
+    include_transcript:
+      required: false
+      input_kind: text
+      value_type: text
+      label: Include Transcript
+      description: Value for CLI option --include-transcript.
+      evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --include-transcript
+        -> $INCLUDE_TRANSCRIPT'
+      cli_option: --include-transcript
+    output_dir:
+      required: false
+      input_kind: directory
+      value_type: text
+      label: Output Dir
+      description: Runtime-managed value for CLI option --output-dir; normally injected
+        by the Node Run workspace instead of user input.
+      evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --output-dir
+        -> $OUTPUT_DIR'
+      cli_option: --output-dir
+      runtime_managed: true
+      ui_group: runtime
+    poll_interval:
+      required: false
+      input_kind: number
+      value_type: number
+      label: Poll Interval
+      description: Value for CLI option --poll-interval.
+      evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --poll-interval
+        -> $POLL_INTERVAL'
+      cli_option: --poll-interval
+    source_url:
+      required: true
+      input_kind: url
+      value_type: url
+      label: Source Url
+      description: Value for CLI option --source-url.
+      evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --source-url
+        -> $SOURCE_URL'
+      cli_option: --source-url
+    timeout_seconds:
+      required: false
+      input_kind: number
+      value_type: number
+      label: Timeout Seconds
+      description: Value for CLI option --timeout-seconds.
+      evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --timeout-seconds
+        -> $TIMEOUT_SECONDS'
+      cli_option: --timeout-seconds
+    workflow_token:
+      required: false
+      input_kind: text
+      value_type: text
+      label: Workflow Token
+      description: Value for CLI option --workflow-token.
+      evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --workflow-token
+        -> $WORKFLOW_TOKEN'
+      cli_option: --workflow-token
+    workflow_url:
+      required: false
+      input_kind: url
+      value_type: url
+      label: Workflow Url
+      description: Value for CLI option --workflow-url.
+      evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --workflow-url
+        -> $WORKFLOW_URL'
+      cli_option: --workflow-url
+handoff:
+  accepts:
+    upstream_outputs_dir:
+      required: false
+      description: 一个或多个上游 Node 的标准输出目录。
+    instruction:
+      required: true
+      description: Edge Handoff Agent 或用户提供的交接说明。
+    context:
+      required: false
+      description: 运行上下文或补充说明。
+  produces:
+    outputs_dir: raw/node-runs/{run_id}/outputs
+    manifest: raw/node-runs/{run_id}/outputs/manifest.json
+outputs:
+  analysis_file:
+    kind: file
+    type: file
+    value_type: markdown
+    relayable: true
+    path: raw/node-runs/{run_id}/outputs/outputs/analysis.md
+    fields:
+      media_type:
+        type: string
+        sample: text/markdown
+      relayable:
+        type: boolean
+        sample: true
+      role:
+        type: string
+        sample: wiki-source
+  transcript_file:
+    kind: file
+    type: file
+    value_type: text
+    relayable: true
+    path: raw/node-runs/{run_id}/outputs/outputs/transcript.txt
+    fields:
+      media_type:
+        type: string
+        sample: text/plain
+      relayable:
+        type: boolean
+        sample: true
+      role:
+        type: string
+        sample: transcript
+  start:
+    kind: file
+    type: file
+    value_type: json
+    relayable: true
+    path: raw/node-runs/{run_id}/outputs/artifacts/start.json
+    fields:
+      media_type:
+        type: string
+        sample: application/json
+      relayable:
+        type: boolean
+        sample: false
+      role:
+        type: string
+        sample: diagnostic
+  status:
+    kind: file
+    type: file
+    value_type: json
+    relayable: true
+    path: raw/node-runs/{run_id}/outputs/artifacts/status.json
+    fields:
+      media_type:
+        type: string
+        sample: application/json
+      relayable:
+        type: boolean
+        sample: false
+      role:
+        type: string
+        sample: diagnostic
+  transcript:
+    kind: files
+    type: files
+    value_type: mixed
+    relayable: true
+    path: raw/node-runs/{run_id}/outputs/artifacts/**
+    fields:
+      media_type:
+        type: string
+        sample: text/vtt
+      relayable:
+        type: boolean
+        sample: false
+      role:
+        type: string
+        sample: diagnostic
+  worker_analysis:
+    kind: file
+    type: file
+    value_type: md
+    relayable: true
+    path: raw/node-runs/{run_id}/outputs/artifacts/worker-analysis.md
+    fields:
+      media_type:
+        type: string
+        sample: text/markdown
+      relayable:
+        type: boolean
+        sample: false
+      role:
+        type: string
+        sample: diagnostic
+capabilities:
+  git:
+    enabled: true
+    required: false
+  telegram:
+    enabled: false
+    required: false
+  sse:
+    enabled: true
+    required: true
+ui:
+  category: custom
+coverage_report:
+  status: passed
+  covered_inputs:
+  - input: include_transcript
+    option: --include-transcript
+    evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --include-transcript
+      -> $INCLUDE_TRANSCRIPT'
+  - input: output_dir
+    option: --output-dir
+    evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --output-dir
+      -> $OUTPUT_DIR'
+  - input: poll_interval
+    option: --poll-interval
+    evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --poll-interval
+      -> $POLL_INTERVAL'
+  - input: source_url
+    option: --source-url
+    evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --source-url
+      -> $SOURCE_URL'
+  - input: timeout_seconds
+    option: --timeout-seconds
+    evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --timeout-seconds
+      -> $TIMEOUT_SECONDS'
+  - input: workflow_token
+    option: --workflow-token
+    evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --workflow-token
+      -> $WORKFLOW_TOKEN'
+  - input: workflow_url
+    option: --workflow-url
+    evidence: 'youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh: option --workflow-url
+      -> $WORKFLOW_URL'
+  missing_inputs: []
+  source_files_read:
+  - youtube-deep-research/SKILL.md
+  - youtube-deep-research/agents/openai.yaml
+  - youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube-deep-research.sh
+  - youtube-deep-research/scripts/youtube_deep_research.py
+  errors: []
+contract_summary:
+  primary_outputs: []
+  artifact_outputs: []
+  auxiliary_outputs:
+  - analysis_file
+  - transcript_file
+  - transcript
+  - worker_analysis
+  diagnostic_outputs:
+  - start
+  - status
+  aliases: {}
+  recommended_edge_outputs: []
+agent_review:
+  summary: Contract review classified runtime-observed outputs into primary, artifact,
+    auxiliary and diagnostic groups.
+  warnings:
+  - code: contract_review_ai_fallback
+    message: The read operation timed out
+  risks: []
+  recommendations:
+  - Run Probe and synthesize contract before publishing.
+  - Keep JSON status payloads as diagnostics unless a downstream Edge explicitly requests
+    them.
+  agent:
+    provider: openai-compatible
+    model: deepseek-v4-pro
+    used_ai: false
+    fallback: deterministic-contract-review
+    error: The read operation timed out
+analysis:
+  contract_synthesis:
+    source: node-draft-probe
+    probe_id: youtube-deep-research-dxky-probe-20260630T130319Z-3167d8
+    node_run_id: node-run-youtube-deep-research-dxky-20260630T130318-1320f1
+    manifest_record_count: 9
+    node_builder_contract_review: true
+    synthesized_at: '2026-06-30T13:10:13.496507+00:00'
--- /dev/null
+++ b/youtube-wiki/skills/youtube-deep-research/SKILL.md
+---
+name: youtube-deep-research
+description: Runtime-published SOP node for Youtube Deep Research.
+---
+
+# Youtube Deep Research
+
+This node was generated by the Runtime Node Builder Agent.
+The source skill install command is stored in `node.yaml`.
instructions: 在开发机 agent-brain-plugins 中应用该 patch。
运行 Python/Shell 校验和相关单元测试。
Runtime 机器 git pull 后重启 bridge 或 re-init。
